questions.question: Я працював дві години до того як dinner started
questions.source_text_uk: Я працював дві години до того як dinner started
questions.target_text: I had been working for two hours before dinner started
questions.hint_uk: Past Perfect Continuous: had been + V-ing для тривалості перед минулим моментом.

questions.question: they чекали з ранку, коли dinner started
questions.source_text_uk: they чекали з ранку, коли dinner started
questions.target_text: they had been waiting since morning when dinner started
questions.hint_uk: Past Perfect Continuous: had been + V-ing для тривалості перед минулим моментом.
